skill.name: quality-manager-qmr
skill.description: Senior Quality Manager Responsible Person (QMR) for HealthTech and MedTech companies. Provides overall quality system responsibility, regulatory compliance oversight, management accountability, and strategic quality leadership. Use for quality system governance, regulatory compliance oversight, management responsibility, and quality strategic planning.
skill.summary: Senior Quality Manager Responsible Person (QMR) for HealthTech and MedTech companies. Provides overa...
skill.author: davila7

security_audit.summary: AI review dismissed all weak cryptography hits as substring matches in quality and regulatory documentation, not cryptographic code. The backtick, network reconnaissance, and environment-access hits are markdown formatting or ordinary domain language; no executable command, secret access, prompt injection, or exfiltration evidence was found.

content.value_statement: HealthTech and MedTech teams need clear ownership for quality system governance and regulatory accountability. This skill helps structure QMR oversight, management review, compliance monitoring, and quality strategy work.
actual_capabilities: Outlines QMR responsibilities for quality system oversight and management accountability.
Frames compliance monitoring across ISO 13485, EU MDR, FDA QSR, and national requirements.
Supports management review planning with quality performance, compliance, and resource topics.
Organizes quality governance topics such as policy, objectives, document control, and audit oversight.
Defines KPI categories for quality system effectiveness, customer quality, product quality, and culture.
limitations: Does not replace legal, regulatory, or notified body advice.
Does not include complete jurisdiction-specific regulatory text.
Does not provide operational scripts beyond placeholder resource references.
Requires company-specific procedures, products, risks, and evidence for final decisions.

use_cases.title: Prepare Management Review
use_cases.description: Build an agenda that covers QMS performance, compliance status, customer feedback, quality costs, and resource needs.

use_cases.title: Assess Compliance Governance
use_cases.description: Map oversight duties for ISO 13485, EU MDR, FDA QSR, and other market requirements.

use_cases.title: Plan Quality Strategy
use_cases.description: Connect quality objectives, KPI monitoring, culture programs, and improvement priorities to business goals.

prompt_templates.title: Create a QMR Responsibility Map
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a QMR responsibility map for our MedTech quality system. Include QMS oversight, compliance oversight, management reporting, and continuous improvement duties.

prompt_templates.title: Draft a Management Review Agenda
prompt_templates.prompt: Draft a quarterly management review agenda for a medical device company. Cover ISO 13485 topics, regulatory compliance, customer feedback, audit results, quality costs, and resource decisions.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Compliance Oversight Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a compliance oversight plan for ISO 13485, EU MDR, and FDA QSR. Include monitoring activities, escalation triggers, evidence records, and senior management reporting.

prompt_templates.title: Design a Quality Strategy Framework
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a one-year quality strategy framework for a growing HealthTech company. Include quality objectives, KPI categories, culture initiatives, audit governance, resource planning, and improvement priorities.

output_examples.input: Prepare a QMR dashboard outline for senior management.
output_examples.output: A dashboard outline with sections for QMS effectiveness, regulatory compliance, customer quality, product quality, quality costs, audit status, and escalation decisions.

output_examples.input: Review our management review process for missing topics.
output_examples.output: A gap-oriented checklist that compares review inputs against quality performance, compliance, customer feedback, audit outcomes, resource needs, and improvement actions.

output_examples.input: Create a quality culture improvement plan.
output_examples.output: A practical plan covering leadership training, quality awareness, communication routines, recognition programs, and measurable culture indicators.

best_practices: Provide the applicable standards, markets, product type, and current QMS maturity before asking for recommendations.
Ask for evidence records and decision owners when planning management review or compliance monitoring.
Have qualified regulatory and quality leaders review outputs before using them in controlled procedures.
anti_patterns: Do not treat generated guidance as final regulatory advice.
Do not use generic QMR responsibilities without mapping them to your procedures and organization chart.
Do not omit documented evidence, approvals, and follow-up owners from governance workflows.

faq.question: What does this skill help with?
faq.answer: It helps structure QMR oversight, management responsibility, compliance monitoring, quality strategy, and management review activities.

faq.question: Which standards does it reference?
faq.answer: It references ISO 13485, EU MDR, FDA QSR, and general multi-market regulatory oversight concepts.

faq.question: Can it make regulatory decisions for my company?
faq.answer: No. It supports planning and review, but qualified personnel must make final regulatory and quality decisions.

faq.question: Does it include working automation scripts?
faq.answer: No. The repository includes placeholder script references, not complete operational automation.

faq.question: Who should use this skill?
faq.answer: Quality managers, regulatory affairs leaders, and executives responsible for medical device quality governance can use it.

faq.question: What information should I provide?
faq.answer: Provide your product type, markets, standards, QMS maturity, audit history, quality objectives, and known compliance concerns.
